TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Wally_Anderzunas, title = Wally_Anderzunas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wally_Anderzunas} }

S.FORM: Wally Anderzunas sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1946, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 1, Wally Anderzunas, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1989) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Wally Anderzunas sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1946, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 1, Wally Anderzunas, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1989) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: wallj an*erzunas~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, wallj an*erzunas~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
